variants.name: 蜘蛛侠
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家（与上个夜晚不同）：如果你选中了爪牙，他会得知此事，且明天白天他的投票算作零票。
variants.firstNightReminder: The Spider-Man points to a player. If a Minion was chosen, wake them and show the THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU card and then the Spider-Man token.
variants.otherNightReminder:
The Spider-Man points to a player, different to last night.

If a Minion was chosen, wake them and show the THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU card and then the Spider-Man token.
variants.flavor: With great power, there must also come great responsibility.
